concerns.text: DatasetCharacteristic entity defined in data-model.md has no corresponding contract schema in contracts/ directory. Plan references dataset characteristics for regression analysis but no validation schema exists.

Model entity defined in data-model.md has no corresponding contract schema in contracts/ directory. Plan references trained models but no validation schema exists for model_id, model_type, training_parameters.

quickstart.md references bootstrap_results.csv as expected artifact but data-model.md does not define a corresponding entity or schema for bootstrap results. Cross-doc inconsistency in artifact documentation.
